falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff score would indicate a confirmed blowoff top, directly contradicting the current HOLD signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 60% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A drop in pattern similarity below 60% would mean the current market behavior no longer aligns with the historical bottom pattern, falsifying the basis for the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price breaks above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above a key long-term support level would indicate a confirmed bullish trend, invalidating the HOLD signal and proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
